title: Origins: Math
description: An Origins addon that adds the capability for you to use math for your Origin powers, as well as enhancing the current capabilities of Resource powers.
body:
Origins: Math is an Origins addon that adds the capability for you to use math for your Origin powers, bridge various Minecraft values as Origin Resource powers, and finally, directly use Resources as Number values in fields!


### This mod is required on both the client and the server!
## Getting Started You can see the documentation for the mod here: [https://origins-math.readthedocs.io/en/latest/](https://origins-math.readthedocs.io/en/latest/)
